SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Text Ruling

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Continued To Feb-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525.
Appellant, Kirill Sobolev appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Vladimir Eydelshteyn, appears in Pro Per. Both parties request a continuance which is granted by the court. The matter will be continued to Feb-26-09, 9:00am, Dept. 525. Court will send notice.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Judgment Entered
